Kelly (Yali) Lin 
Clara Road, Tullamore, Offaly 
Phone: 085 150 1600       Email: y.lin1@universityofgalway.ie
Personal Profile
Currently a 3rd year Computer Science & I.T student at the University of Galway, with a strong foundation in software development, system administration, and data analysis. Enthusiastic and methodical, with proven communication, customer service, and teamwork skills gained through 1.5 years of experience at Aura Leisure Centre. Eager to apply and further develop technical skills in a dynamic I.T environment.
Education
2022 – present 
BSc Computer Science & I.T 
University of Galway Second year grade 2:1 
Modules: Software Engineering, Object-Oriented programming, Networks & Data communications, Next Generation Technologies, Computer Systems & Organisation, Database Systems, Statistics for Data science, Maths. 
Projects: Developed a web-based ticketing system using HTML, CSS, JavaScript, and a backend framework (e.g., Django, Flask) to manage and track customer support tickets efficiently. 
Implemented a server system using Bash scripting to handle multiple client connections, execute commands, and log activities.
2016 – 2022   
Sacred Heart School, Tullamore 
Leaving Cert (510): Music(H1), Biology (H2), English(H2), Maths(H3), Physics(H4), French(H4), Irish(O2) 
Experience
2022 – 2024 Receptionist & Admin 
Aura, Tullamore, Offaly 
•         Proficient in Microsoft Office Suite (Word, Excel, Outlook) and experienced in managing administrative tasks, including data entry, record keeping, and customer support
• Perform other clerical receptionist duties such as photocopying, transcribing, filing, keeping records of office expenses, sorting and distributing paperwork, and so on. 
•         Interact with colleagues to resolve important administrative matters for smooth running services and keeping the clients in the center. 
•         Manage data in excel spreadsheets, acquiring and listing personal information of our customers in the center while maintaining GDPR. 
•         Update guest information on the company’s computer system. •         Provide customer support by answering the phone and replying to emails promptly.
Skills
IT:
C: Proficient in system-level programming and developing efficient algorithms, 
Java: Experienced in building robust, object-oriented applications, 
JavaScript: Skilled in creating dynamic and interactive web pages, 
HTML: Proficient in structuring and designing web content, 
Bash: Experienced in writing scripts for automating tasks in Unix/Linux environments. Others include SQL, Matlab, Git and R.
Also experienced in Wireshark, which is a powerful network protocol analyser. Analytical: Enhancing analytical skills is crucial for problem-solving and system optimization. Proficiency in programming languages like C, Java, and JavaScript enables dissecting complex problems and designing efficient solutions. Additionally, group projects require analyzing requirements, balancing functionality with resources, and effective communication among members for optimal results.
Communication: Developed effective communication skills, including verbal, non- verbal, technological, and visual, through my front desk job and group projects in college. Engaged in recommendations and voiced opinions tactfully. Attentive listening and alertness are key to understanding individuals.
Teamwork: Teamwork was essential in the leisure center. Operating the entire center with a small team, we communicated and planned together, which significantly strengthened my teamwork skills. In group projects, we often faced disagreements, but by addressing conflicts openly and finding common ground, we overcame these challenges and achieved our goals

Interests
•         Video Games/Computing: Enthusiastic about video games and computer hardware. Experienced in building custom gaming PCs, having successfully assembled three systems.
